flashcards.back: Transmission Control Protocol - connection-oriented protocol providing reliable, ordered delivery of byte streams
Network architecture approach that separates the control plane from the data plane, enabling centralized network management

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of a Content Delivery Network (CDN)?
flashcards.back: To distribute content geographically to reduce latency and improve performance by serving content from edge locations closer to users

flashcards.front: What does RPC stand for and what is its purpose?
flashcards.back: Remote Procedure Call - enables programs to execute procedures on remote systems as if they were local calls
Approach that replaces dedicated hardware network appliances with software running on commercial off-the-shelf servers
